zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Blakiston於大約1398年出生在英國達勒姆時，他的父親William Blakiston Jr22歲，母親Katharine24歲。他於1420年與Isabel Fulthorpe在英國英格蘭達勒姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1473年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Blakiston于大约1398年出生在英国達勒姆时，他的父亲William Blakiston Jr22岁，母亲Katharine24岁。他于1420年与Isabel Fulthorpe在英国英格兰達勒姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1473年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blakiston
meanings: Blaec, black, isc, signifying likeness, and tun, town, meaning a blackish town

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Blakiston was born about 1398, in Durham, England, his father, William Blakiston Jr, was 22 and his mother, Katharine, was 24. He married Isabel Fulthorpe in 1420, in Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1473, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Blakiston est né environ 1398, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, William Blakiston Jr, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katharine, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Fulthorpe en 1420, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1473, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Blakiston um 1398 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Blakiston Jr 22 und seine Mutter Katharine 24. Er hat 1420 in Durham, England, United Kingdom Isabel Fulthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1473 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Blakiston è nato il circa 1398 nel Durham, England, il suo padre, William Blakiston Jr, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Katharine, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Fulthorpe nel 1420, nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1473, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Blakistonが約1398年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父William Blakiston Jrは22歳，母Katharineは24歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスダルハムでIsabel Fulthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1473年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Blakiston(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Blakiston Jr(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Katharine(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 Isabel Fulthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1473년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1398–about 1473: tany ho any amin'ny 1398–tany ho any amin'ny 1473

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Blakiston nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Blakiston Jr, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Katharine, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Fulthorpe em 1420, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1473, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Blakiston родился около 1398 г. в местности дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени William Blakiston Jr было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katharine, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Fulthorpe в 1420 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1473 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

sm.about 1398–about 1473: e tusa o le 1398–e tusa o le 1473

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Blakiston nació aproximadamente 1398, en Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, William Blakiston Jr, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Katharine, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel Fulthorpe en 1420, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1473, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
